fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one binding measurement record.

fields.name: compound_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the compound (e.g., MOL_0001 or ChEMBL ID).

fields.name: compound_name
fields.description: Common or generic name of the compound, if available.

fields.name: compound_smiles
fields.description: SMILES string representing the compound structure.
fields.normalization_rule: Use canonical SMILES, strip all salts, neutralize charges where chemically appropriate; store original in notes if modified.

fields.name: egfr_variant
fields.description: EGFR mutational status (e.g., WT, L858R, T790M, Exon19_del).
fields.normalization_rule: Convert string to uppercase. Strip any whitespace. Parse mutational codes and sort compound mutations alphabetically using an underscore separator (e.g., sort 'T790M/L858R' to 'L858R_T790M'). Standardize wild-type as 'WT' and use HGVS-like notation for deletions/insertions (e.g., 'delE746_A750').

fields.name: standard_type
fields.description: Standard measurement type of an inhibitor activity (e.g. IC50, Ki, Kd).

fields.name: standard_relation
fields.description: Precision relation for the standard value (e.g., '=', '>', '<', '>=', '<=').
fields.normalization_rule: If the relation is reported as '~', 'approx.', 'around', or is missing entirely, default it to '='.

fields.name: standard_value
fields.description: Numeric value as reported in the source.

fields.name: standard_units
fields.description: Unit of standard_value (nM, μM, pM, etc.).
fields.normalization_rule: Map synonyms to nM, μM, pM, M; store original in notes if converted.

fields.name: normalized_value_nm
fields.description: Measured activity converted to nanomolar (nM) for comparison.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert standard_value using standard_units to nM.

fields.name: pchembl_value
fields.description: Negative log molar concentration (pChEMBL) calculated from normalized_value_nm.

fields.name: assay_type
fields.description: Experimental assay type: kinase activity/binding or cell proliferation/viability.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert string to lowercase. Standardize to either 'biochemical' or 'cellular'.

fields.name: cell_line
fields.description: Specific cell line used for cellular assays.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert string to uppercase, strip whitespaces and hyphens (e.g., standardizing 'Ba/F3' or 'BaF3' to 'BA/F3').

fields.name: atp_concentration_uM
fields.description: ATP concentration in micromolar (uM) used in biochemical assays.

fields.name: covalent_flag
fields.description: True if the inhibitor binds covalently to the target.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking to an entry in specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: extraction_method
fields.description: How the record was obtained (pdf_manual, pdf_table, web_scrape, etc.).

fields.name: extraction_confidence
fields.description: Confidence in extracted values: high, medium, low, or unknown.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes, caveats, or provenance details.
fields.example: Value taken from Table 2; unit inferred from caption.
